items.translated_title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage

images.alt: The Meta Quest 3 mixed reality headset viewed from the front

items.content: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99.
